title:
55d Karina Road New Plymouth. Heritage A

content:
## 55d Karina Road New Plymouth. Heritage A
Can you provide any historic information on this property  Was known as (Captain) Mace cottage. now has a placard saying "Foxglove Cottage"
I have been asked to sell the property on behalf of a terminally ill owner and need to ensure the information I am passing out is accurate

#### Likely Source Agency
Taranaki Regional Council
